General Awareness.question: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG) of India?

The CAG of India shall only be removed from office in like manner and on the like grounds as a Judge of the Supreme Court.
The CAG of India is appointed by the Prime Minister of India.

Reasoning.question: Seven people - P, Q, R, S, T, U and V are sitting in a same row at equal distances facing towards north. Neither U nor V is sitting at any of the extreme ends. Who among the following are sitting at the extreme ends?
